message:
feat(output): continue Output abstraction migration

Continue converting remaining commands to Output/rich_rust:
- Convert cmd_list output (tweets, likes, DMs, conversations, followers, etc.)
- Convert cmd_tweet and cmd_tweet_thread output
- Convert cmd_config output
- Reduce println! calls from 142 to 99 (43 more conversions)
